## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss HeyGen's content strategy, workflow improvements, and upcoming projects.](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New workflow templates for landing pages and lead generation to be developed using AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Content production continues with 10 articles/week, including e-learning, marketing, and general topics](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Tools directory needs categorization; Nav to provide category mappings](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Webflow publishing constraints causing issues; team considering migration to a more robust CMS](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

## Topics

### AirOps Workflow Templates

  - [Nav and Nick proposed creating new AirOps workflow templates for SEM page types and landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Jimmy agreed to task Daniel (CTO) with building these workflows as an engineering project](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [Team will provide a 30-second video explaining specific requirements for the templates](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Goal is to increase content production velocity and create variations more quickly](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)

### Content Production and Publishing

  - [Currently producing 10 articles per week: 3 e-learning, 2 marketing, 5 general topics](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [Publishing schedule: Tuesday to Friday, around 10 PM Bisera's time](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Webflow limitations causing conflicts with dev team work; considering migration to a more flexible CMS like Sanity](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [Nav to explore better workflow for coordinating publishing and development work](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)

### Tools Directory Development

  - [Nav requested faster production of tool pages, even without finalized creative assets](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Bisera asked for categorization of tools to streamline content creation](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [Nav will export tool list from Airtable, tag with categories, and send back to Bisera](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Seeing positive growth: 31% week-over-week improvement](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Expecting to reach hundreds of clicks per day soon due to strong domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Jimmy mentioned potential content collaborations with Ramp and other clients](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Discussed integrating HeyGen into their agency program](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nav to send categorized tool list to Bisera for directory content creation](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [Jimmy to share 30-second workflow template requirements video with Daniel](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Team to explore CMS alternatives to Webflow for improved publishing workflow](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [Bisera to continue with planned content production: 10 blog posts, 5 language pages, 5 tool pages this week](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [Nav to provide feedback on content through shared Google Doc](https://fathom.video/share/BtDHtWEnP4yzC4MsFFzJigpG9uj41tiY?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
